title: Data Analyst
description: We are seeking a Data Analyst. Must have strong skills in SQL, Python, and Excel. Experience with Power BI is a plus.

title: Business Intelligence Developer
description: Join our team to build dashboards. Required: Excel, Power BI, SQL. Python knowledge is preferred.

title: Data Scientist
description: Looking for a Data Scientist with Python, SQL, and Machine Learning expertise. Cloud experience (AWS) is helpful.

title: Junior Data Analyst
description: Entry level position. Clean data using Excel, SQL. Good Communication skills are required.

title: Senior Data Analyst
description: Experienced analyst wanted. Required: SQL, Python, Tableau. Excellent Communication and Data Analysis skills.

title: Cloud Data Engineer
description: Build pipelines on AWS. Required: Python, SQL, Git, AWS.

title: Data Analytics Lead
description: Lead a team of analysts. Requires Excel, Tableau, SQL, and strong Communication.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Research and deploy ML models. Python, Git, Machine Learning, AWS, Azure are required.

title: Business Analyst
description: Analyze business requirements. Must be proficient in Excel, Power BI, and Communication.

title: Data Developer
description: Develop data applications. Required: Python, SQL, Java, Git.
